title: YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW ST JOHNS YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient services for drug and alcohol use disorders for youth and their families, including integrated mental health care. Services are available in the community, including schools. Also provides a bilingual, culturally specific outpatient program for Latino youth and their families. 8425 N Lombard Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Ages 12-18 (19 if still in high school) and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-1pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 283-4776 For follow-up calls Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals on sliding scale. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 4, 17, and 75 Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ACTIVE PARENTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW ST JOHNS
